zh.lifeSummary: 當Julienne Comyn於1251年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登時，她的父親Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway36歲，母親Eve Stewart of Lennox27歲。她於1265年之前與Alexander Macdougall在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾奧班享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Julienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Julian  , now also found in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Julienne Comyn was born in 1251, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, was 36 and her mother, Eve Stewart of Lennox, was 27. She married Alexander Macdougall before 1265, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1337, in Oban, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julienne Comyn est née en 1251, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Eve Stewart of Lennox, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Macdougall avant 1265, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1337, à Oban, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse.

Sie hat vor 1265 in Argyll, Scotland Alexander Macdougall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1337 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Oban, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Julienne Comynが1251年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで生まれた時，父Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Gallowayは36歳，母Eve Stewart of Lennoxは27歳であった。1265年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでAlexander Macdougallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルオバンで86歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunstaffnage Castle, Oban, Argyllshire,: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오반
ko.lifeSummary: Julienne Comyn(이)가 1251년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve Stewart of Lennox(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1265년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Alexander Macdougall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 오반에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Alexander Macdougall antes 1265, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Dunstaffnage Castle, Oban, Argyllshire,: обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julienne Comyn родилась в 1251 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve Stewart of Lennox, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Macdougall перед 1265 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1337 г. в местности обань, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

Murió en 1337, en Oban, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Scotland.
